content_body: This is the most romantic cabin we have ever stayed in. We spent two very cozy nights in the hot tub and snuggling under a warm blanket by the fire. Thomas made french toast each morning and fed me in bed - so sweet and romantic! We never want to go back to Atlanta. We are going to take one more warm nap on the couch before we go. . .
title: A Very Romantic Weekend at The Rivers Edge
